resources.string: Create a new event in Wakeve
View unread invitations, votes, and reminders
Congratulations! You earned %1$d points and the \'%2$s\' badge
Help us plan better by estimating participant counts
Maximum must be greater than or equal to minimum
This helps us suggest appropriate venues and estimate costs for ~%1$d people
Add a potential location for your event
At least one time slot is required
Add at least one time slot
Are you sure you want to delete \"%1$s\"? This action cannot be undone.
Select at least 2 options to compare
This option has been selected. Voting is locked.
Create a meeting to get started with virtual collaboration
When the organizer creates a meeting, it will appear here
Are you sure you want to delete \"%1$s\"? This action cannot be undone.
Replies and comments will appear here.
No action is required at the moment.
You\'re up to date! New notifications will appear here.
Create your first album to organize your photos
Great for flexible events that can happen anywhere in the city
Perfect for regional events (e.g., \"South of France\")
Use this for a specific address or venue
For virtual events via Zoom, Meet, etc.
💡 Enter exact start and end times
By continuing, you agree to our terms of service and privacy policy
Collaborative polls to find the best date
Shared budget and group pot tracking
Organize events with friends and colleagues. Set dates, propose time slots, and let the group vote.
Track participants, answers, and responsibilities without burying decisions in chat threads.
Centralize lodging, meals, activities, transport, and budget when the group moves from idea to plan.
Keep the date, reminders, and next useful actions clear until the day of the event.
We\'ll send you a 6-digit code to verify your account
Review the information before creating the event
You can go back to edit the information
This invitation has reached its maximum number of uses
You are already participating in this event
Events will appear here once they are created.\nStart by creating one!
Try different keywords or adjust the filters.
2-3 day getaway with accommodation and activities
Family reunion with meals and photos
Multi-day trip with transport and shared budget
The more dates you suggest, the easier it is to find a consensus.
A voting deadline encourages participants to respond quickly.
Compare different options (destination, accommodation, activities) to optimize your event.
Early cost transparency avoids unpleasant surprises.
Your notifications will appear here when someone votes, comments, or updates an event.
Get notified when a participant votes
Get notified when an event changes status
Reminders on the day of the event
Notifications will be muted during this period.
The organizer will add options for this event.
Plan virtual meetings for your event
When the organizer creates a meeting, it will appear here
By signing in, you agree to our
Alerts will not be delivered on this device
Go back to the previous screen
Collaborative event planning with polls, budgets, and offline sync.
You’re all caught up. New notifications will appear here.
Notifications requiring action will appear here.
Statistics and analytics for your events
Confirm your attendance to access meeting details.
Confirm your attendance to access payment pot details.
Confirm your attendance to open Tricount details.
Confirm your attendance to access budget details.
Confirm your attendance to access expense details.
Start the conversation to help the group move forward.
Comments could not be loaded. Try again.
Delete %1$s’s comment? This action cannot be undone.
Add a comment to the event
The comment could not be saved. Try again.
The comment could not be deleted. Try again.
No next step yet: add an activity to guide the group.
The schedule does not have a planned day yet.
Priority: set a date for at least one activity.
The timed schedule is ready to share.
Remove “%1$s” from the budget? This does not remove reimbursements recorded elsewhere.
Cost must be a positive number.
This expense could not be saved. Try again.
No paid expenses to split yet.
Paid expenses are balanced between participants.
Showing %1$d priority reimbursements out of %2$d to balance paid expenses.
The budget can be viewed after the organizer creates it.
Active payment pot – %1$.2f %2$s. Changes are saved on this device.
No active payment pot for this event.
Track the payment pot and participant contributions.
No Tricount link is associated yet. Add a verified link before redirecting participants.
Prepare shared settlement through a verified link.
Sync pending. Local changes are waiting to be sent.
Local changes are waiting to be sent.

plurals.name: budget_settlement_body
plurals.item: %1$d reimbursement must be settled so everyone pays their actual share.
%1$d reimbursements must be settled so everyone pays their actual share.

resources.string: Select the event type to prepare a list suited to the group.
